summary: Pass the cookie domain and file path to the pycookiecheat Python helper via process environment instead of interpolating them into the -c source.
reason: filepath.ToSlash does not escape double quotes, so a Chrome data dir containing a quote could terminate the Python string literal early or inject code. Env values never pass through a shell, eliminating the escaping concern (Greptile P2-security on auth.go).
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass; live dogfood gate re-run green.
